data.title: Bitcoin Spot ETFs See Significant Inflows on September 12
data.description:
According to Foresight News, data from SoSoValue indicates that Bitcoin spot ETFs experienced a total net inflow of $642 million on September 12, Eastern Time. The Fidelity ETF FBTC led the inflows with $315 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $12.627 billion. Following closely, the Blackrock ETF IBIT saw a net inflow of $265 million, with its historical total reaching $59.778 billion.

As of the latest report, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs stands at $153.178 billion. The net asset ratio of these ETFs, compared to the total market value of Bitcoin, is 6.62%, with cumulative historical net inflows amounting to $56.831 billion.

data.title: Hackers Exploit Microsoft Teams to Target Cryptocurrency Users
data.description: The Web3 security firm HashDit stated on X, “Hackers are using Microsoft Teams to compromise users and steal their cryptocurrency. The attack is deceptively simple and relies on social engineering tactics.”

data.title: Nasdaq sets new high as S&P 500 rides momentum into Fed’s big week
data.description:
The Nasdaq Composite finished Friday at 22,141. 10, pushing up 0. 44%, and notched its fifth straight record close this week, according to data from CNBC. The rally was led by a big lift in Tesla shares, with the Nasdaq logging a 2% gain over the past five trading days. The S&P 500 ended nearly unchanged, down […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/nasdaq-new-high-sp-500-rides-feds-big-week/

data.title: Wall Street bullish on riskiest stocks, sees Russell 2000 topping S&P 500
data.description:
Wall Street is betting on America’s smallest public companies to take the lead. The Russell 2000, a benchmark packed with companies few retail traders ever touch, has jumped nearly 10% since late July, doubling the gain in the S&P 500. That outperformance has caught the attention of strategists, who now expect this rally to keep […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/wall-street-bullish-on-riskiest-stocks/

data.title: Binance will postpone the STBL token airdrop
data.description: According to the official announcement, the STBL (STBL) token airdrop event on the Binance Alpha platform has been delayed. Please wait for the official announcement for the specific distribution time.

data.title: Vitalik: AI governance is not recommended, and information finance methods are more supported
data.description: Regarding the community's concerns that AI could be tricked and phished in extremely stupid ways, thereby leaking data, Ethereum co-founder Vitalik said on the X platform, "AI governance is not a good idea. If you use AI to allocate donated funds, people will use jailbreak tools as much as possible. As an alternative, I support information finance, an open market where anyone can contribute their models, which will be subject to a spot check mechanism that can be triggered by anyone and evaluated by a human jury."

data.title: Dogecoin Defies Odds, Jumps 21% Even As ETF Debut Gets Pushed Back
data.description:
Dogecoin climbed after reports said the first US Dogecoin ETF won approval, even though its trading debut was pushed back. Traders piled in anyway, sending volume higher and sparking talk across exchanges and social channels. The memecoin’s bounce came amid mixed signals about timing. Related Reading: Institutional Adoption Rises: 21X Brings Chainlink Into Europe’s Tokenized Securities Market ETF Approval And Pushback Based on reports, the REX-Osprey Dogecoin ETF, ticker DOJE, received regulatory approval under the Investment Company Act of 1940
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/dogecoin-defies-odds-jumps-21-even-as-etf-debut-gets-pushed-back/

data.title: Vitalik Buterin warns against rushed AI governance in crypto
data.description:
13-9-2025 – Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has warned of the dangers in deploying artificial intelligence for governance within the cryptocurrency industry. In a recent social media post, Buterin acknowledged widespread enthusiasm for AI’s potential in streamlining decision-making processes but stressed longstanding safety challenges with the technology. He specifically cautioned that integrating AI could cause substantial [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/vitalik-buterin-warns-against-rushed-ai-governance-in-crypto/

data.title: A newly created address bought 9,486 ETH in the past hour at an average price of $4,720.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a newly created wallet received 44.78 million USDC from Coinbase Prime and purchased 9,486 ETH at an average price of $4,720 in the past hour.

data.title: Galaxy Digital bought nearly 5 million SOL tokens in the past three days, worth approximately $1.16 billion.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, Galaxy Digital has purchased nearly 5 million SOL (approximately US$1.16 billion) in the past three days, of which 4,719,937 SOL (approximately US$1.11 billion) have been transferred to Coinbase Prime for custody, and its wallet address still holds 219,830 SOL, approximately US$53.5 million.

data.title: The number of active addresses on the X Layer network reached 71,400, setting a new record high.
data.description: According to OKLink data, the number of active addresses on the X Layer network reached 71,400 on September 12th, a record high. Since OKB was upgraded to the X Layer network token, the number of X Layer addresses has increased by over 2.5 million, now exceeding 4 million. The X Layer network has already contributed nearly $1 million in fees to the OKX DEX.

data.title: Ethereum Co-Founder Warns Against AI as Governance Tool
data.description: According to Foresight News, Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin expressed concerns on social media about the potential risks of using artificial intelligence as a governance tool in the crypto sector. Buterin highlighted that while many in the industry are optimistic about AI's role in governance, there are inherent risks. He pointed out traditional AI safety issues and warned that implementing AI in governance could lead to significant value disruption in the short term.

data.title: The largest long address on Hyperliquid currently has a floating profit of $7.1 million, with a BTC long position valued at $145 million.
data.description: According to on-chain data analyst Yu Jin, following the market rebound, INeedACook, the largest long position on Hyperliquid, has seen a $7.1 million unrealized profit. His primary position is reportedly 1,250 BTC, valued at $145 million, with a current unrealized profit of $2.78 million. In addition to his BTC long position, he also holds long positions in DOGE, FARTCOIN, and PEPE, all of which are also currently in profit.

data.title: Ethereum breaks $4,700 as whale accumulates $28M in ETH and WBTC
data.description:
13-9-2025 – Ethereum has surpassed the $4,700 threshold, reaching $4,701. 47 USDT on Binance, marking a 4. 28% rise over the past 24 hours. This surge coincides with aggressive buying from a major investor who has ramped up positions in ETH and Wrapped Bitcoin since September 9
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/ethereum-breaks-4700-as-whale-accumulates-28m-in-eth-and-wbtc/

data.title: Gemini's stock price rose 14.29% on its first day of listing, with a total market capitalization of US$3.801 billion.
data.description: According to market data, Gemini Space Station (GEMI) closed up 14.29% on its first day of listing (compared to its IPO price of $28). The maximum increase at the opening was 45.39%, breaking through $40. Since then, the price has continued to fall, closing at $32. The total market value is temporarily reported at $3.801 billion, the trading volume reached $1.182 billion, and the trading volume reached 32.9888 million shares.
